name: billply
description: Infrastructure-as-code CLI for Stripe SaaS billing.

scripts.smoke: pnpm exec tsx src/cli.ts plan --config examples/billply.yaml && pnpm exec tsx src/cli.ts verify --config examples/billply.yaml && pnpm exec tsx src/cli.ts export --config examples/billply.yaml
scripts.release:check: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm smoke && pnpm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
